name_en: CELINE 2022 New Arrival Ava Shoulder Bag Large Flower Series vs Classic Edition: The difference is the size of the Triumphal Arch logo. The Large Flower Series is a limited edition, definitely not a common sight. A perfect vintage and stylish look!!
name_cn:
CELINE 2022 New Arrival Ava Shoulder Bag Large Flower Series vs Classic Edition: The difference is the size of the Triumphal Arch logo. The Large Flower Series is a limited edition, definitely not a common sight. A perfect vintage and stylish look!!
Match: Versatile shoulder bag, easy to switch styles, a must-have item.
Capacity: Ample for daily outings👍
Model: 193952
Size: 25x7x18cm, Brown
